name: AEGIS WF11 — Power Outage Report Density Monitor

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ incidentType: 'power_outage', severity: $json.severity, probability: $json.probability, message: $json.reportCount + ' power outage reports. ' + $json.criticalReports + ' critical (infrastructure/hospitals). ' + $json.areaWideReports + ' area-wide.', source: 'n8n_power_outage_monitor', metadata: { reportCount: $json.reportCount, criticalReports: $json.criticalReports } }) }}
